overall_justification: While the edition focuses heavily on coffee valorization news and contains no explicit discussion of the Caixa de Conversão mechanism itself, the overwhelming emphasis on celebrating the Convênio de Taubaté (which implicitly relied on the Caixa as outlined in Article 8 for its loan-based funding) and the "salvação da lavoura" strongly suggests an overall endorsement of policies aimed at supporting the coffee sector. This aligns with the Expansionist perspective, which viewed the Caixa as a tool to aid producers and stimulate the economy.  The sheer volume and positive framing of the Taubaté news outweigh the absence of direct Caixa discussions.

supporting_evidence.quote: Ao sr. presidente do Estado foram ainda hontem dirigidos os seguintes telegrammas de felicitações pela assignatura do accordo retro-referido ao Convenio de Taubaté:
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This sets the tone for the entire front page, highlighting the celebration of the Convênio, which is intrinsically linked to the expansionist view of the Caixa.

supporting_evidence.quote: Felicitações pelo accordo definitivo sobre a valorização do café.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: Repeated mentions of "valorização do café" reinforce the focus on policies favored by Expansionists.

supporting_evidence.quote: Commissionados pelos lavradores da zona, felicitamos v. exa. pela execução do Convênio que representa a salvação da lavoura.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote directly connects the Convênio to the "salvação da lavoura," a key argument of the Expansionist perspective.
